sellers_note: Spacious, refined, and loaded with premium technology, this Atlas SEL delivers strong turbocharged performance with a smooth, confident ride. Powered by a 2.0L turbo engine producing around 269 horsepower, it offers impressive capability with standard all-wheel drive and up to 5,000 lbs of towing capacity.Inside, enjoy a premium interior with leather seating, heated and ventilated front seats, a panoramic sunroof, Digital Cockpit Pro, navigation, wireless charging, and advanced driver-assist features. With three rows of comfortable seating and excellent cargo space, it's perfect for family life, commuting, and long road trips.Come see us at North Penn Volkswagen and ask about our North Penn Advantage!
engine: 2L I-4 gasoline direct injection, DOHC, variable valve control,
features: ["Third Row Seating", "HomeLink", "Adaptive Cruise Control", "Alloy Wheels", "Android Auto\u00ae", "Apple CarPlay\u00ae", "Automatic Emergency Braking", "Backup Camera", "Blind Spot Monitor", "Bluetooth\u00ae", "Brake Assist", "Cooled Seats", "Stability Control", "Sunroof/Moonroof", "Keyless Start", "Rear Cross Traffic Alert", "LED Headlights", "Heated Seats", "Heated Steering Wheel", "Navigation System", "Keyless Entry", "Remote Start", "Lane Departure Warning", "Leather Seats", "Roof Rack", "Memory Seat", "Power Liftgate", "Rain Sensing Wipers", "Satellite Radio", "Tow Hitch", "USB Port", "WiFi Hotspot"]
